command: make test-unit (cd app && npx vitest run)

pre_existing_failures.note: None — full unit suite is green at baseline (post-S2). S3's scope is app/tests/e2e/** only, which vitest's unit suite does not touch, so baseline == final for this command.

lint.detail: No ESLint config exists in app/ (no .eslintrc*/eslint.config*); `next lint` prompts interactively to scaffold one. Matches S1/S2's recorded baseline.

typecheck.detail: app/tsconfig.json excludes `tests` entirely, so this command never covers app/tests/e2e/** (S3's actual scope). Ad-hoc due diligence: an extended tsconfig that includes tests/e2e/**/*.ts was run separately (see result.json) and shows the SAME widespread pre-existing `typeof USER_A` literal-type errors (privateKeyHex narrowed via `as const`) in files S3 never touched (e.g. contact-card-deeplink.spec.ts, dm-pairing-*.spec.ts, groups-join-request-live.spec.ts, groups-invite-link.spec.ts, update-detection.spec.ts) — confirming this is pre-existing e2e-tree debt with no configured gate, not something introduced by this story.
